TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kaliliman == micidekay kusuday atu kikay wawaśÄ™ŚćöŚ£ęŤąáś©üŚô®Ś®ÉŚ®É micidekay kusuday atu kikay a wawa "kamu nu Lipwud, Dr.„āĻ„É©„É≥„Éó,kamu nu Ing Dr. Slump" Cong-Kow tal aimi "Y-la -lye" Syang-kang" a imi "IQ kusuday" Cong-kow talu a kamu "satinengay a kusuday atu kikay a wawa niza" nu Zipun a mangga Nyaw-san-min 1980 a mihcaan a nisulita a bangga. zumaay a mangga nu Nyaw-san-min "Ci-lung-cu"a misaigi itini tu a banggaan a tahkal, u Ci-lung-cu" angangan a miigiay ci sun-u-kungpatelac a micumud tu ci-e a niyazu' miculek tahkal paazih. i inaka a niyazu' "taduk a niyazu'', singanganay u sitinengay a ce-cye-cyen misebengay hitay a sukuday, maydih misanga' tu malecaday tademaw a kikay tademaw, kabahalan misannga' tu caay ku nizatengan a ce-cyen-a-la-lye, musakamu tu pacebaay a kungkku namakayza malingatu. nisumadan musaungayay bangga i tilibi nu tung-ing a nisanga'an musaungayay bangga. Saayaway a nisanga'an i 1981 a mihca 4 a bulad 8 a demiad katukuh 1986 a mihca 2 a bulad 19 a demiad i bu-se tilibi patahkal paazih "Zipun a tuki tulu a demiad tu paylipay 19:3019:00" Taywan ku situngusa patahkal u min-se-u-syen-tay, hwa-se,wi-se-cong-win-tay,tung-sen tilibi hatini ku mialaay a tilibi, Syeng situngusay patahkal u Syang-kang-u-syen tilibi ku mialaay, nu Syang-kangay angangan a dadiw ci Mey-yen-hang ku mudadiway, 2009 a mihca 7 a bulad 17 a demiad J2 muliyaw patahkal. 1997 a mihcaan muliyaw patahkal tu niliyawan a nisanga'an a cudad, pabelin han u "baluhay micidekay a kusuday atu kikay wawa" pangangnan han tu "baluhay¬∑kikay wawa micidekay kusuday", katuud ku wayway nu miigiay nanisumad tu, Syang-kangay, yu-syen tilibi adiwawaay a tilibi i ayaw tu 2003 a mihcaan saayaway patahkal tuyni a nisanga'an, angangan a dadiw ci U-tan-zu ku mudadiway, u-syen tilibi i 2014 a mihcaan kya micakay tuyni nisanga'an caay paacai a situngus patahkal I tilibi, I 2014 a mihca 4 a bulad 23 a demiad malingatu patahkal paazih. 1997 . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kar~…ĺir~…ĺiman == mi ¶id…ôkaj kusudaj atu kikaj wawa******** mi ¶id…ôkaj kusudaj atu kikaj a wawa "kamu nu r~…ĺipwud, dr.****,kamu nu iŇč dr. sr~…ĺump" ¶oŇč-kow tar~…ĺ aimi "j-r~…ĺa -r~…ĺj…ô" sjaŇč-kaŇč" a imi "i* kusudaj" ¶oŇč-kow tar~…ĺu a kamu "satin…ôŇčaj a kusudaj atu kikaj a wawa niza" nu zipun a maŇčga njaw-san-min **** a mińß ¶aan a nisur~…ĺita a baŇčga. zumaaj a maŇčga nu njaw-san-min " ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶u"a misaigi itini tu a baŇčgaan a tańßkar~…ĺ, u ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶u" aŇčaŇčan a miigiaj ¶i sun-u-kuŇčpat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a mi ¶umud tu ¶i-…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° mi ¶ur~…ĺ…ôk tańßkar~…ĺ paazińß. i inaka a nijazu Ē~ ° "taduk a nijazu Ē~ ° Ē~ °, siŇčaŇčanaj u sitin…ôŇčaj a ¶…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶j…ôn mis…ôb…ôŇčaj ńßitaj a sukudaj, majdińß misaŇča Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tad…ômaw a kikaj tad…ômaw, kabańßar~…ĺan misanŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶aaj ku nizat…ôŇčan a ¶…ô- ¶j…ôn-a-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺj…ô, musakamu tu pa ¶…ôbaaj a kuŇčkku namakajza mar~…ĺiŇčatu. nisumadan musauŇčajaj baŇčga i tir~…ĺibi nu tuŇč-iŇč a nisaŇča Ē~ °an musauŇčajaj baŇčga. saajawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad i bu-s…ô tir~…ĺibi patańßkar~…ĺ paazińß "zipun a tuki tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad tu pajr~…ĺipaj **:****:**" tajwan ku situŇčusa patańßkar~…ĺ u min-s…ô-u-sj…ôn-taj, ńßwa-s…ô,wi-s…ô- ¶oŇč-win-taj,tuŇč-s…ôn tir~…ĺibi ńßatini ku miar~…ĺaaj a tir~…ĺibi, sj…ôŇč situŇčusaj patańßkar~…ĺ u sjaŇč-kaŇč-u-sj…ôn tir~…ĺibi ku miar~…ĺaaj, nu sjaŇč-kaŇčaj aŇčaŇčan a dadiw ¶i m…ô-j…ôn-ńßaŇč ku mudadiwaj, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ** mur~…ĺijaw patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan mur~…ĺijaw patańßkar~…ĺ tu nir~…ĺijawan a nisaŇča Ē~ °an a ¶udad, pab…ôr~…ĺin ńßan u "bar~…ĺuńßaj mi ¶id…ôkaj a kusudaj atu kikaj wawa" paŇčaŇčnan ńßan tu "bar~…ĺuńßaj*kikaj wawa mi ¶id…ôkaj kusudaj", katuud ku wajwaj nu miigiaj nanisumad tu, sjaŇč-kaŇčaj, ju-sj…ôn tir~…ĺibi adiwawaaj a tir~…ĺibi i ajaw tu **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ tujni a nisaŇča Ē~ °an, aŇčaŇčan a dadiw ¶i u-tan-zu ku mudadiwaj, u-sj…ôn tir~…ĺibi i **** a mińß ¶aan kja mi ¶akaj tujni nisaŇča Ē~ °an ¶aaj paa ¶ai a situŇčus patańßkar~…ĺ i tir~…ĺibi, i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu patańßkar~…ĺ paazińß. **** . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kaliliman == micidekay kusuday atu kikay wawaśÄ™ŚćöŚ£ęŤąáś©üŚô®Ś®ÉŚ®É micidekay kusuday atu kikay a wawa "kamu nu Lipwud, Dr.„āĻ„É©„É≥„Éó,kamu nu Ing Dr. Slump" Cong-Kow tal aimi "Y-la -lye" Syang-kang" a imi "IQ kusuday" Cong-kow talu a kamu "satinengay a kusuday atu kikay a wawa niza" nu Zipun a mangga Nyaw-san-min 1980 a mihcaan a nisulita a bangga. zumaay a mangga nu Nyaw-san-min "Ci-lung-cu"a misaigi itini tu a banggaan a tahkal, u Ci-lung-cu" angangan a miigiay ci sun-u-kungpatelac a micumud tu ci-e a niyazu' miculek tahkal paazih. i inaka a niyazu' "taduk a niyazu'', singanganay u sitinengay a ce-cye-cyen misebengay hitay a sukuday, maydih misanga' tu malecaday tademaw a kikay tademaw, kabahalan misannga' tu caay ku nizatengan a ce-cyen-a-la-lye, musakamu tu pacebaay a kungkku namakayza malingatu. nisumadan musaungayay bangga i tilibi nu tung-ing a nisanga'an musaungayay bangga. Saayaway a nisanga'an i 1981 a mihca 4 a bulad 8 a demiad katukuh 1986 a mihca 2 a bulad 19 a demiad i bu-se tilibi patahkal paazih "Zipun a tuki tulu a demiad tu paylipay 19:3019:00" Taywan ku situngusa patahkal u min-se-u-syen-tay, hwa-se,wi-se-cong-win-tay,tung-sen tilibi hatini ku mialaay a tilibi, Syeng situngusay patahkal u Syang-kang-u-syen tilibi ku mialaay, nu Syang-kangay angangan a dadiw ci Mey-yen-hang ku mudadiway, 2009 a mihca 7 a bulad 17 a demiad J2 muliyaw patahkal. 1997 a mihcaan muliyaw patahkal tu niliyawan a nisanga'an a cudad, pabelin han u "baluhay micidekay a kusuday atu kikay wawa" pangangnan han tu "baluhay¬∑kikay wawa micidekay kusuday", katuud ku wayway nu miigiay nanisumad tu, Syang-kangay, yu-syen tilibi adiwawaay a tilibi i ayaw tu 2003 a mihcaan saayaway patahkal tuyni a nisanga'an, angangan a dadiw ci U-tan-zu ku mudadiway, u-syen tilibi i 2014 a mihcaan kya micakay tuyni nisanga'an caay paacai a situngus patahkal I tilibi, I 2014 a mihca 4 a bulad 23 a demiad malingatu patahkal paazih. 1997 . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

nu njaw-san-min " ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶u"a misaigi itini tu a baŇčgaan a tańßkar~…ĺ, u ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶u" aŇčaŇčan a miigiaj ¶i sun-u-kuŇčpat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a mi ¶umud tu ¶i-…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° mi ¶ur~…ĺ…ôk tańßkar~…ĺ tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad tu pajr~…ĺipaj **:****:**" tajwan ku situŇčusa patańßkar~…ĺ u min-s…ô-u-sj…ôn-taj, ńßwa-s…ô,wi-s…ô- ¶oŇč-win-taj,tuŇč-s…ôn tir~…ĺibi ńßatini ku miar~…ĺaaj a tir~…ĺibi, sj…ôŇč situŇčusaj patańßkar~…ĺ u sjaŇč-kaŇč-u-sj…ôn tir~…ĺibi ku miar~…ĺaaj, nu sjaŇč-kaŇčaj aŇčaŇčan a dadiw ¶i m…ô-j…ôn-ńßaŇč ku mudadiwaj, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ** mur~…ĺijaw patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan mur~…ĺijaw patańßkar~…ĺ tu nir~…ĺijawan a nisaŇča Ē~ °an a ¶udad, pab…ôr~…ĺin ńßan u "bar~…ĺuńßaj mi ¶id…ôkaj a kusudaj atu kikaj wawa" paŇčaŇčnan ńßan tu
